name: legwork
description: The legwork manual loop, packaged as a one-line-install Claude Code plugin. The plugin is the repo's core/ directory itself: one editable source, zero drift, zero autonomy code in the artifact.

plugins.name: legwork
plugins.description: Project queue for Claude Code: /add, /wrap, /pickup, /log, /shelve, /vision and the legwork-tracker skill, plus a static dashboard. The lite level-1 loop; autonomy (the runner + reviewer) is a re-run of ./install.sh away.
